name: Andrew Gillum
subject: We have one month to bring it home:
body:
\--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36b8/9e00690/5111a60e/2401ee06/2338125464/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em18_181006_1Month_fnd_gq_act__AG_ettx&source=em18_181006_1Month_fnd_gq_act__AG_ettx")
Friends,

I know I've said it before, but I'm going to say it again: This race isn't just about who will be the next Governor of Florida.

It's about the issues that will outlast this election -- ensuring affordable healthcare as a right for all Floridians; fighting for our public school students and teachers; and protecting our land, water, and coasts for future generations.

I know times are tough right now across the country. And I know many of us are experiencing a tremendous amount of stress, anger, and anxiety. But if we can find a way to channel these frustrations into action, then I promise you we will be able to move Florida forward.

**[This is our chance to create change -- you and me together along with thousands of other like-minded folks across the state. So, are you ready? Chip in $5 or more now and let's get to work.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36b8/9e00690/5111a60e/2401ee1e/2338125464/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-one-month?gpsid=13_55_4165&refcode=em18_181006_1Month_fnd_gq_act__AG_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181006_1Month_fnd_gq_act__AG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&recur_weekly=yes&utm_content=9+-+This+is+our+chance+to+create+change++you")**

The final month of this election is the most critical of the whole campaign. It's when voters are really going to be paying attention and it's when our opponents are going to get even more vicious with their attacks against us. We need to be ready, and we need to make this grassroots campaign a little stronger each day so we don't end up short on election night.

**[That's why we're asking strong supporters like you to step up and chip in $5 or more now. Can I count on you?](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36b8/9e00690/5111a60e/2401ee11/2338125464/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-one-month?gpsid=13_55_4165&refcode=em18_181006_1Month_fnd_gq_act__AG_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181006_1Month_fnd_gq_act__AG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&recur_weekly=yes&utm_content=10+-+Thats+why+were+asking+strong+supporters+")**

Bring it home,

Andrew Gillum

subject: exactly one month away
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Supporters of Molly Kelly
body:
| | |
---
We're exactly **one month** from Election Day, friends.
You can count on Molly to follow through on her promise to finally put New Hampshire's working families over special interests as governor because **she refuses to accept any money from corporate special interests**. She's accountable to you. That's it.

We only have ONE MONTH left in this campaign, team.

One month left to win this fight for working families. To protect affordable health care. To say loudly and clearly that we won't let this administration harm Medicare, Medicaid or Social Security. To demand an education system that works for everyone.

This final month will be powered by donations from our grassroots network of supporters like you. We'll use our resources to get out the vote, to make sure voters hear our message and to organize with other Democrats running all the way down the ballot. **What can you give today to make Election Day 2018 -- one month from today -- one to remember?** _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Donate $5 now](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20181006_fr1_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=5")** **[Donate $25 now](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20181006_fr1_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")** You've probably heard that Democrats can take back the Senate in 2018, and that's true, but that can't happen if we don't win here in Pennsylvania. We can make sure we have a strong check on the Trump administration fighting for Pennsylvanians in the Senate, but we can't be complacent. We can't miss this opportunity to change the game for working families.

Outside groups are spending more to help my opponent: they released a disgusting new radio ad attacking my record just this week. A lot can happen in the next month, and the investments we make now will determine the outcome on November 6.

**In the final month of this race, every dollar makes a difference. So please, if you can, make a donation to support this campaign today.**

Here's the best link: **_[secure.bobcasey.com/donate](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20181006_fr1_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")_**

Thanks, as always, for your support,

Bob

If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: "" "" "" "" You've probably heard that Democrats can take back the Senate in 2018, and that's true, but that can't happen if we don't win here in Pennsylvania. We can make sure we have a strong check on the Trump administration fighting for Pennsylvanians in the Senate, but we can't be complacent. We can't miss this opportunity to change the game for working families. Outside groups are spending more to help my opponent: they released a disgusting new radio ad attacking my record just this week. A lot can happen in the next month, and the investments we make now will determine the outcome on November 6. In the final month of this race, every dollar makes a difference. So please, if you can, make a donation to support this campaign today. Here's the best link: "" Thanks, as always, for your support, Bob | | Bob needs a strong team to help keep this Senate seat blue so he can continue to protect Medicare, Medicaid and Social Security, fight for working families and be a check on the Trump administration. name: TK 2018 - Jessalyn Reid
subject: A sign of how much we need to do, and exactly one month before we need to do it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
Today is exactly one month from the 2018 midterm elections. November 6th, 2018 will be our chance to speak up and to be heard. -------------------------------------------------------------------------
|
---
[ ](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1061/3e0906/76ebcb4f/3e37a563/1253527897/VEsH/ "https://www.timkaine.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=20181006_1_FR_JR_one-month-out&source=20181006_1_FR_JR_one-month-out")

| | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Derek, I know you've been watching the news and I know we've been sending you plenty of emails throughout what has been an exhausting, frustrating, and disheartening nomination process. It feels like this process has shown off the worst of our political divide - but I'm reminding myself that in Dr. Christine Blasey Ford's courageous stand, and in the millions who have stood alongside her, we have also seen deep goodness and determination.

**Here 's the other thing I'm reminding myself: Today is exactly one month from the 2018 midterm elections. [November 6th, 2018](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1061/3e0906/76ebcb4f/3e37a562/1253527897/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-gotv?refcode=20181006_1_FR_JR_one-month-out&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+November+6th+2018&utm_campaign=20181006_1_FR_JR_one-month-out&source=20181006_1_FR_JR_one-month-out") will be our chance to speak up and to be heard.**

So Derek, over this month, we're going to ask you to help channel not only our frustration, but also our determination. We're going to ask for your help in talking to our neighbors, empowering voters, and preserving our democracy. [We're going to ask you to support our "Get Out the Vote" efforts that will be in full swing this month. But through all that, we're also going to make a few promises to you:](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1061/3e0906/76ebcb4f/3e37a561/1253527897/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-gotv?refcode=20181006_1_FR_JR_one-month-out&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+Wersquore+going+to+ask+you+to+support+ou&utm_campaign=20181006_1_FR_JR_one-month-out&source=20181006_1_FR_JR_one-month-out")
* \-- **Our team will talk the talk and walk the walk.** Almost every week Tim joins our field organizers at offices as canvassers get ready to go out into their neighborhoods and knock on doors to talk to voters. They go out to hear people's concerns, meet their families, and share their own stories.

* \-- **We 're going to chase after every last vote.** We're investing in new tools that will let us talk to voters in new ways. For example: my team is sending texts to people to make sure they got their absentee ballots and know their options on how to get them in. Doesn't even matter if that vote is necessarily for Tim - what matters most is that Virginians get to be heard.

* \-- **We 're going to show up.** Sure, this can be tiring, but that doesn't matter - we're going to get up every day ready and excited get to work making sure that we are visible and engaged in every district and for every voter. Because whether you're organizing online or at the door, there's just no substitute for old fashioned hard work.

**If you can help fund us in this last month, we also promise that your donations will go to all of the things I mentioned: Events with House candidates, neighbor to neighbor canvasses, and new tools that help Virginians know how, when and where they can vote.**

**You can do that here:** [https://secure.timkaine.com/Get-Out-the-Vote-Fund](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1061/3e0906/76ebcb4f/3e37a560/1253527897/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-gotv?refcode=20181006_1_FR_JR_one-month-out&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=4+-+httpssecuretimkainecomGetOuttheVoteFund&utm_campaign=20181006_1_FR_JR_one-month-out&source=20181006_1_FR_JR_one-month-out")

Our entire team comes into the office every day grateful to get to to do this work, and honored to march towards November with you - hoping that maybe, just maybe, we're helping make democracy work a little better and speak a little louder.

Let's keep on keeping on.

_Jess_

Jessalyn Reid
Digital Director
Tim Kaine for Virginia | [**DONATE**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1061/3e0906/76ebcb4f/3e37a567/1253527897/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-gotv?refcode=20181006_1_FR_JR_one-month-out&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=5+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20181006_1_FR_JR_one-month-out&source=20181006_1_FR_JR_one-month-out")

As a Texan, born and raised, I can confirm: yes, everything really is
bigger here, like our trucks, tacos, our love of football -- even our
elections. Just look at this crowd of nearly 60,000 fired-up Texans who
joined us in Austin to rally for Beto with Willie Nelson:

everyday folks who are doing extraordinary work, building and executing
the largest ‘get out the vote’ (GOTV) campaign in Texas history.

knocking on 102,733 doors and making 102,733 phone calls to Texas voters.

| | | I want to send a quick note thanking you for boosting my campaign ahead of New Mexico's voter registration deadline. You are helping us stand strong.

But I also want to give you a few words of encouragement. The last few weeks have been trying to say the least. I am sure you're frustrated, angry, and saddened...and I am too.

It's clearer than ever that retaking the Senate is absolutely critical. And thanks to your support of grassroots campaigns like mine, we are one step closer to that goal. There's still a lot of work ahead of us, but I am hopeful for the future because I know you are standing with me. Thank you again for your support and action.

Sincerely,

Martin

subject: Hugin continues to spend more and lie more
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Menendez for Senate
body:
Friend,

There are less than five weeks left in this election. And because Bob Hugin can't run on the non-existent positive things he has done for New Jersey, I have no doubt that more negative attacks and lies are coming.

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: one month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
About a year and a half ago, I decided to run for Congress. Now, amazingly, Election Day is one short month away.
| | Peter, About a year and a half ago, when Rep. Dave Brat voted for a health care repeal bill that would have harmed many families in our district and undermined protections for those with pre-existing health conditions, I knew that Virginians deserved better. I saw that we needed more leaders serving us in Congress with a sincere commitment to consensus-building and problem-solving, rather than blind partisanship -- **and so I decided to run myself.** In the year-plus since, we have built an incredible grassroots movement to deliver positive change to Virginia's 7th district. Our campaign, 4,000+ volunteers strong, has engaged in important, substantive conversations about our community and how to make it better. I've heard from thousands of you about your concerns and your hopes for the future, and I'm so thankful for it. **Now, amazingly, Election Day is one short month away.** VA-7, once viewed as safely Republican, is now a pure toss-up. We have made so much progress together, and now we are entering the very final stretch. The next month will be our toughest yet, Peter. We have pushed this race to a tie, and we are up against Super PACs and others determined to stop us from winning this seat. I won't do it without you. [**Will you make a donation today, to mark this important one-month-out milestone, so my campaign can close this race strong and deliver a win for Virginia families?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/AkyNko0JlO-EkwB5ksVb0z41gwH0YwPnaX0lCKEBBVc=/0cF2Qqy78ZrJf9VIxdejOJ1wIk-DcvXNg2rmppY-6NY=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.06_b1_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) Thank you, Peter, for your support. name: Andrew Gillum
subject: Legalize it. Tax it. Use the revenue to fix Florida's public schools.
body:
\--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36bf/9e00690/5176195e/2401ef53/2351182661/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em18_181006_educ2_fnd_gq_nopn__AG_ettx&source=em18_181006_educ2_fnd_gq_nopn__AG_ettx")
Friends,

Our public schools are underfunded and our teachers are underpaid. Last year, our state ranked 47th in average instructional staff pay. Teachers are struggling to make ends meet, and our kids and their education are suffering.

That's why I've proposed a bold new plan to legalize and tax recreational marijuana -- so we can invest new revenue into giving our teachers and instructional staff the raise they deserve. We're going to make sure every teacher and support staff member earns at least the national average, reward our veteran teachers for their years of service, and raise the starting salary for new teachers.

**[A majority of Floridians support it, and states across the country are modernizing their criminal justice systems by legalizing as well. It's time Florida joins them. body:
One month out from Election Day and we must power the blue wave.

| [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7b843/2f5ea88d/74da45b2/2cbc6f07/4173129089/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ji-power-the-blue-wave?utm_source=ema_2018-10-06_one-month-out&refcode=ema_2018-10-06_one-month-out&utm_campaign=one-month-out&utm_medium=ema") Friend, **We're ONE MONTH out from Election Day.** After 22 months of chaos and corruption in the other Washington, **voters will finally have their say on Nove mber 6.** It's the most consequential midterm election in years. To hold President Trump and his administration fully accountable, end Republican-generated gridlock in Congress, and continue building on our progress here, we must elect Democrats up and down the ticket on November 6. **That's why I'm asking for your help to power the blue wave.** This election is our chance to get Democrats to Congress and the state legislature, but we can't do it without a progressive movement intent on winning. [**Friend, can you pitch in right now to help us build the movement we'll need to win on November 6 and keep making progress in Washington state and beyond?**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7b843/2f5ea88d/74da45b2/2cbc6f07/4173129089/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ji-power-the-blue-wave?utm_source=ema_2018-10-06_one-month-out&refcode=ema_2018-10-06_one-month-out&utm_campaign=one-month-out&utm_medium=ema") | [CONTRIBUTE »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7b843/2f5ea88d/74da45b2/2cbc6f07/4173129089/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ji-power-the-blue-wave?utm_source=ema_2018-10-06_one-month-out&refcode=ema_2018-10-06_one-month-out&utm_campaign=one-month-out&utm_medium=ema")

Over the past few weeks, we've seen the importance of the U.S. Senate in determining the future direction of the Supreme Court. We've witnessed the callous disregard for affordable healthcare for millions of hard-working Americans by congressional Republicans.
The right of women to make their own reproductive choices, combating climate change, protecting our environment, the civil rights of minority communities, the safety of immigrants, and protecting children from being ripped from their parent's arms are all under attack by the Trump administration.
**Here in Washington state, Republicans want to grab control of the state legislature to roll back the progress we've made. We can't let that happen.**
I know the press keeps talking about a **blue wave** , but I won't believe it until I see it._It's critical that Democrats turn out in record numbers in Novem ber, in Washington and elsewhere, _and that we start building a long-term strategy for Democrats. We can't afford to sit back and let Republicans win.
[**That's why I need you to help us see the FULL impact of the blue wave. name: Tina Smith
subject: We lost this vote, but we did not lose the values we were fighting for.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Please read.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-october?refcode=rtw_20181006_em&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Sturgeon Lake&state=MN&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Friend, there are times when the stakes of a "yea" or "nay" vote are giant. When the impact of each Senator's vote is not just a bill passing or failing, but a vote that will change the life of every person in the country. The confirmation of a Supreme Court Justice is one of those moments. I voted no on Brett Kavanaugh's nomination to the Supreme Court today because I firmly believe he could be the deciding vote against a woman's access to health care, insurance coverage for people with pre-existing conditions, and environmental protections. He should have been voted down, and I believe those who voted for him will remember this vote with regret. I was in the chamber as we learned that Republicans had reached the necessary threshold Friday, and I understand how easy it is to be discouraged in this moment. How you can get trapped into thinking what devastating Supreme Court decisions could be next. It's on the front of my mind, too. But I also know that there is a chance for every person in America to put their values -- and their anger about this vote -- on the record this November. Together, if enough of us take this anger, this frustration, and channel it into action -- we can show that every Republican who voted lock-step with Trump to confirm this man to the Supreme Court will be held accountable. And for those of us on the ballot in races that could decide control of the Senate or House of Representatives we must double our efforts and ensure that we have the majority needed to stop any future attacks on our values. **Friend, I know you fought your heart out and I know how tough it is in these moments to lose when you do that. But, I promise, if we keep fighting, we can still bend the arc of history a little closer towards progress. Because we may have lost this vote today, but we did not lose the values inside each and every one of us that drove us to get involved in this fight in the first place. And that matters.** Thank you for everything you have done, and will do. Tina | **Tina Smith is a fierce progressive running for U.S. Senate in a special election in Minnesota. That 's why Senate Republicans and Donald Trump have made her one of their top targets. She needs your help if she is going to win this tough race. ** [CONTRIBUTE](https://action.tinaforminnesota. How you can get trapped into thinking what devastating Supreme Court decisions could be next. It's on the front of my mind, too. But I also know that there is a chance for every person in America to put their values -- and their anger about this vote -- on the record this November. Together, if enough of us take this anger, this frustration, and channel it into action -- we can show that every Republican who voted lock-step with Trump to confirm this man to the Supreme Court will be held accountable. And for those of us on the ballot in races that could decide control of the Senate or House of Representatives we must double our efforts and ensure that we have the majority needed to stop any future attacks on our values. Friend, I know you fought your heart out and I know how tough it is in these moments to lose when you do that. But, I promise, if we keep fighting, we can still bend the arc of history a little closer towards progress. Because we may have lost this vote today, but we did not lose the values inside each and every one of us that drove us to get involved in this fight in the first place. And that matters. Thank you for everything you have done, and will do. Tina | Tina Smith is a fierce progressive running for U.S. Senate in a special election in Minnesota. That 's why Senate Republicans and Donald Trump have made her one of their top targets. She needs your help if she is going to win this tough race. name: Tim Kaine
subject: I have just stepped off the Senate floor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
| | Derek:

I've just stepped off the Senate floor, where Republicans have narrowly voted to confirm Judge Brett Kavanaugh to the Supreme Court.

I am deeply disappointed at the way Republicans shamelessly jammed through this nomination--and the utter lack of respect given to Dr. Christine Blasey Ford's experience, her pain, and her word.

I am angry that so many in power, who ought to be leading by example, stood by as our young people watched this sham of a process unfold--or unravel, to put it more accurately.

And to be frank, I'm worried about what's next for Americans.

What I am hopeful about--as always--is the strength of our will to channel our disappointment, anger, and worry into action. I am counting on our resilience as we push to find whatever good we can. And I am grateful to have you with me in this ongoing forward fight.

If you, like me, find yourself looking for something to do--a "next step" that reminds us to pick ourselves up and keep moving, here are some options:

Make sure you're registered to vote this November. Visit [iwillvote.com](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1063/3e0906/76fb816b/3e37a611/2786407874/VEsH/ "https://iwillvote.com?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+iwillvotecom&utm_campaign=20181006_2_FR_TK_kavanaugh-results&source=20181006_2_FR_TK_kavanaugh-results") to check your voter registration and ensure that it's up to date.

If you're in Virginia, sign up to get involved in your neighborhood during this election by visiting [timkaine.com/events](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1063/3e0906/76fb816b/3e37a610/2786407874/VEsE/ "https://timkaine.com/events?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+timkainecomevents&utm_campaign=20181006_2_FR_TK_kavanaugh-results&source=20181006_2_FR_TK_kavanaugh-results"). name: Jason Yates
subject: Today is historic, and Nov 6 will be, too
body:
Peter,
After weeks of hearings and vigorous debate, the United States Senate voted 50 to 48 today to confirm Brett Kavanaugh to the Supreme Court. Senator Lisa Murkowski, of Alaska, voted "present" to "pair" her vote with fellow GOP Senator Steve Daines, who supported the nominee but is attending his daughter’s wedding in Montana today.
The Senate’s vote is a victory for the Constitution because the process worked. It’s also a victory for people of faith.
It’s important for me to explain what I mean.
Despite what the mainstream media has claimed, this was not a choice between standing in agreement with the #MeToo movement or voting in support of Brett Kavanaugh.
This was a confirmation vote to assess if Kavanaugh was qualified to serve on the Supreme Court, which 7 FBI background checks and decades of experience did not dispute.
Yet, it’s important to recognize the pain this process has uncovered in our nation.
The #MeToo movement has revealed an important issue in our nation: the deplorable lack of dignity for women. Christian men, acting like real men, know that women are made in the image of God and deserving of dignity and respect—they are image-bearers, not images as the world promotes. This is a spiritual battle we face, and it should bring us to our knees for our mothers, wives, daughters, and neighbors.
Unfortunately, the #MeToo movement is also being hijacked for political gain and without regard for those it negatively affects. Those families involved in these hearings have been torn apart and forever wounded. That is equally deplorable.
In the midst of all the noise and pain, it’s critical to acknowledge Kavanaugh is, in fact, one of the most qualified individuals to ever sit on the Supreme Court.
* For 12 years he has served on the D.C. Circuit Court, often referred to as the “Second Highest Court in the Land.”
* The Supreme Court has endorsed Kavanaugh’s opinions more than a dozen times, including Kavanaugh’s dissents that have become the law of the land.
* And Kavanaugh has over 300 published opinions that reveal he believes in applying the law as written and upholding the text, structure and original understanding of the Constitution.

We have supported Kavanaugh because he has a track record of upholding the Constitution, which means the values we cherish most such as life and religious liberty will be protected by the highest court in our nation.
**Those who have been against this confirmation, even before a nominee was named, are now more motivated than ever to win in the midterms; they will turnout in record numbers, and so must we.**
Today is historic because a new Supreme Court Justice has been confirmed, but tomorrow and every day between now and November 6th will also be historic.
The values that will win in November will be those that were fought for in a passionate, strategic, motivated get-out-the-vote effort in the next 31 days.
It’s so important, especially now, that Christians go to the polls to advance biblical values in November.
**Now is our time.** Our time to stand firm and stand in God’s authority.
We are working round the clock to reach like-minded Christians across the country.
**You can do two things to make a difference in the midterm elections:**
1. **[Pledge to Vote](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iSPl3_AVzw-8MP0x3pn0DheOUCZtOl7In3u1MF20L9AU&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181006com01nd&n=1 "Pledge to Vote"). **When you make this commitment to vote on Election Day, you are committing to stand united to see Christians bring their faith to the voting booth.
2. [**Support our effort with a contribution**](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p181006apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181006com01nd&n=2 "Support our effort with a contribution") **to help put our voter guide in the hands of hundreds of thousands of Christians.** We now have a voter guide that provides a full ballot for every national, state, and local election in the nation. We need to quickly get this in the hands of others!

We must continue to fight for our values all the way through until Election Day.
**United. We Stand.**
Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181006com01nd&n=3)
[](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p181006apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181006com01nd&n=4)
©2018 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181006com01nd&n=5).

| Friend,

Today, Democrat obstruction came to a screeching halt. **The resistance efforts of Joe Donnelly and his Democrat pals failed.** Judge Brett Kavanaugh will be a U.S. Supreme Court Justice, and it’s no thanks to Democrat Joe Donnelly.

Democrat Donnelly had two chances to cast the right vote – and both times he chose to side with his Democrat Party bosses rather than with the Hoosiers who elected him to represent us in the United States Senate. **These votes were an unforgivable betrayal of his constituents** , and prove yet again that Democrat Donnelly puts politics first, second and third.

As we have seen with his votes against tax reform, for Obamacare, and support of the flawed Iran nuclear deal, Democrat Joe Donnelly is part of the problem in Washington. He has shown us time and time again that he doesn’t work for us; he works for his Democrat bosses who want to stall President Donald J. Trump’s agenda and reverse our nation’s progress.

President Trump should be applauded for making an outstanding pick in nominating Judge Kavanaugh to the U.S. Supreme Court, as should the Republicans who stood up in the face of Democrat obstruction to confirm this highly-qualified and well-respected nominee. Thanks to them, we will all benefit from having Judge Kavanaugh’s sharp legal mind on the bench for decades to come.

While Democrat Joe Donnelly may have done what Chuck Schumer wanted him to do today, **Hoosiers will do what we have to do in November: send Democrat Donnelly packing.**

\- Chairman Kyle Hupfer

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: The Supreme Court
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
body:
Today, the Senate voted on the nomination of Brett Kavanaugh to the U.S.
Supreme Court. If I were in the Senate, I would have voted no.

The events of the past two weeks — including Dr. Ford’s courageous,
powerful, and credible testimony and Judge Kavanaugh’s temperament in his
response — have only added to my concern that he does not meet the bar to
serve on the Supreme Court.

I am disappointed that he was confirmed. I know that today’s news and the
headlines we’ve seen over the last few weeks have been extremely difficult
for many Texans and especially painful for survivors of sexual assault and
sexual harassment — so many of whom bravely spoke out, shared their
stories, and continue to lead the way. The news has also been hard on
those who might feel let down after making their voices heard by calling
their senators, organizing with one another, uniting for what we believe
in. Today, we are going to come together for one another.

But tonight and tomorrow and in the days that follow, I want you to know
that we are going to meet this disappointment weighing on many of us with
the power of people who want to make sure that our government represents
all of us. In a democracy, the government is the people and the people are
the government. If the government does not represent the will of the
people, we will change the makeup of the government.

We will ensure that the senators voting on lifetime appointments to the
Supreme Court fight for people, for our rights, for our future. That they
put country over party. That they bring a sense of civility and decency to
what is supposed to be the greatest deliberative body in the world.

Together — not as Democrats or Republicans but as Texans and
Americans — we will ensure that the next nominee to be confirmed to the
Supreme Court represents all of our interests.

We will do it because in a state that is last in voter turnout — not by
accident but by design — we understand the importance of voting rights.

We will do it because in a state that is the epicenter for the maternal
mortality crisis — three times as deadly for African American women — we
understand that Roe vs. Wade is the decided law of the land and that women
should be able to make their own decisions about their own bodies, and
have access to the healthcare that will save their lives.

We will do it because in a state where you can be fired for being gay and
where the justice system does not serve everyone, we understand the
importance of civil rights and equal justice under law.

And we will do it because we understand the need to put people over PACs,
people over corporations, and people over special interests.

Thank you for staying strong for one another, for Texas, and for this
country. We will not let one another down.

Beto

The events of the past two weeks — including Dr. Ford’s courageous, powerful, and credible testimony and Judge Kavanaugh’s temperament in his response — have only added to my concern that he does not meet the bar to serve on the Supreme Court. I am disappointed that he was confirmed. I know that today’s news and the headlines we’ve seen over the last few weeks have been extremely difficult for many Texans and especially painful for survivors of sexual assault and sexual harassment — so many of whom bravely spoke out, shared their stories, and continue to lead the way. The news has also been hard on those who might feel let down after making their voices heard by calling their senators, organizing with one another, uniting for what we believe in. Today, we are going to come together for one another. But tonight and tomorrow and in the days that follow, I want you to know that we are going to meet this disappointment weighing on many of us with the power of people who want to make sure that our government represents all of us. In a democracy, the government is the people and the people are the government. If the government does not represent the will of the people, we will change the makeup of the government. We will ensure that the senators voting on lifetime appointments to the Supreme Court fight for people, for our rights, for our future. That they put country over party. That they bring a sense of civility and decency to what is supposed to be the greatest deliberative body in the world. Together — not as Democrats or Republicans but as Texans and Americans — we will ensure that the next nominee to be confirmed to the Supreme Court represents all of our interests. We will do it because in a state that is last in voter turnout — not by accident but by design — we understand the importance of voting rights. We will do it because in a state that is the epicenter for the maternal mortality crisis — three times as deadly for African American women — we understand that Roe vs. Wade is the decided law of the land and that women should be able to make their own decisions about their own bodies, and have access to the healthcare that will save their lives. We will do it because in a state where you can be fired for being gay and where the justice system does not serve everyone, we understand the importance of civil rights and equal justice under law. And we will do it because we understand the need to put people over PACs, people over corporations, and people over special interests. Thank you for staying strong for one another, for Texas, and for this country. We will not let one another down. Beto Contribute to Beto's campaign:
